title: Embedding Generation Flow
activity_flow: START: Caller invokes Embeddings::for(string[] inputs): PendingEmbeddingsGeneration
ACTIVITY: PendingEmbeddingsGeneration constructed with $inputs; optional fluent config via ->dimensions(int), ->timeout(int), ->cache(?int)
ACTIVITY: Provider::formatProviderAndModelList() resolves provider+model list (from arg or ai.default_for_embeddings config)
ACTIVITY: Ai::fakeableEmbeddingProvider($provider) — if faked, wraps provider with FakeEmbeddingGateway
ACTIVITY: resolve $model (default if null), resolve $dimensions (default if null)
YES: Cache::store()->get(sha256 cache key) → hit? return EmbeddingsResponse from cache
ACTIVITY: events->dispatch(new GeneratingEmbeddings(invocationId, provider, model, prompt))
[Real] ACTIVITY: HTTP call to provider API → parse response → EmbeddingsResponse(embeddings[][], tokens, Meta)
DECISION: responses is array or Closure?
ACTIVITY: events->dispatch(new EmbeddingsGenerated(invocationId, provider, model, prompt, response))
YES: event(ProviderFailedOver), continue to next provider
NO: optionally cache response → cacheStore()->put(cacheKey, json_encode(response), TTL)
END LOOP — if all providers failed: throw $lastException
key_relationships: Embeddings::fake() delegates to Ai::fakeEmbeddings() → creates FakeEmbeddingGateway
Embeddings assert methods delegate to Ai manager (InteractsWithFakeEmbeddings trait)
Provider uses GeneratesEmbeddings trait which implements embeddings()
GeneratesEmbeddings uses HasEmbeddingGateway trait to get EmbeddingGateway
HasEmbeddingGateway falls back to provider->gateway if embeddingGateway not set
EmbeddingGateway::generateEmbeddings() is the actual HTTP dispatch point
FakeEmbeddingGateway generates normalized random unit vectors via Embeddings::fakeEmbedding()
Cache layer wraps provider->embeddings() in PendingEmbeddingsGeneration::generate()
GeneratingEmbeddings event fired before gateway call; EmbeddingsGenerated event fired after
interfaces_and_contracts: EmbeddingProvider: embeddings(inputs, ?dimensions, ?model, timeout): EmbeddingsResponse; embeddingGateway(): EmbeddingGateway; useEmbeddingGateway(gateway): self; defaultEmbeddingsModel(): string; defaultEmbeddingsDimensions(): int
EmbeddingGateway: generateEmbeddings(provider, model, inputs, dimensions, timeout): EmbeddingsResponse
data_objects: EmbeddingsPrompt: inputs[], dimensions, provider, model, timeout — passed to events and fake gateway
QueuedEmbeddingsPrompt: inputs[], dimensions, provider, model, timeout — for queue path
EmbeddingsResponse: embeddings[][], tokens, Meta(provider, model) — implements Arrayable, Countable, IteratorAggregate, JsonSerializable
GeneratingEmbeddings event: invocationId, provider, model, prompt
EmbeddingsGenerated event: invocationId, provider, model, prompt, response
fake_and_testing_support: Embeddings::fake(Closure|array $responses): registers FakeEmbeddingGateway in Ai manager
Ai::fakeableEmbeddingProvider() injects FakeEmbeddingGateway onto real provider via useEmbeddingGateway()
FakeEmbeddingGateway cycles through responses array or invokes Closure per request
If no response found and !preventStrayGenerations: auto-generates random normalized float[] vectors
preventStrayEmbeddings(true) causes RuntimeException on unfaked generation
Ai::recordEmbeddingsGeneration() stores prompts in recordedEmbeddingsGenerations[] or recordedQueuedEmbeddingsGenerations[]
Assert methods: assertEmbeddingsGenerated(cb), assertEmbeddingsNotGenerated(cb), assertNoEmbeddingsGenerated(), assertEmbeddingsQueued(cb), assertEmbeddingsNotQueued(cb), assertNoEmbeddingsQueued()
important_notes: Cache key is sha256(driver-model-dimensions-inputs). Default cache TTL is 30 days. Failover iterates provider list on FailoverableException. VoyageAi test shows: POST to https://api.voyageai.com/v1/embeddings with {model, input, output_dimension}, Bearer token auth, response parsed as {data[].embedding, usage.total_tokens}. Default VoyageAi dimensions = 1024.
